ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tours" (
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tour */,
  "tour_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational tour */,
  "tour_date" TEXT /* Date of the tour */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tour is conducted */,
  "tour_type" TEXT /* Type of tour (e.g., farm tour, animal care workshop) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Length of the tour in minutes */,
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tour guide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tours_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES tour_guides ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tour_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tour guide */,
  "guide_name" TEXT /* Name of the tour guide */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the tour guide */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., farm management, animal care) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tour_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tour session */,
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tour */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the tour session */,
  "session_time" TEXT /* Time of the tour session */,
  "num_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tour_sessions_tour_id FOREIGN KEY ("tour_id") REFERENCES tours ("tour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback form */,
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific tour related to the feedback form */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback form was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback form was last updated */,
  "form_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback form (e.g., draft, published, closed) */,
  "is_template" INTEGER /* Whether the form is a template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_forms_tour_id FOREIGN KEY ("tour_id") REFERENCES tours ("tour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feedback form this question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question being asked */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, rating scale, open-ended) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Whether the question is required */,
  "depends_on" INTEGER /* ID of the question this question depends on (for conditional logic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES feedback_forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question this option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the option */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_options_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question this response belongs to */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the participant's response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., submitted, pending review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response this comment belongs to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_comments_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feedback form being analyzed */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question being analyzed */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score calculated from responses (1 to 5 scale) */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses received for the question */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., overall, by question, by demographic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_analysis_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_analysis_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES feedback_forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, tour guide, participant) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with this role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant accessing the system */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that participant has */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "accessed_feature" TEXT /* Specific feature or page accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
